properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Someday the silver cord will break And I no more as now shall sing But oh the joy when I awake Within the palace of the king

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I will see Him face to face And tell the story saved by grace And I will see Him face to face And tell the story saved by grace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Someday my earthly house will fall I cannot tell when it will be But this I know my all in all Has built a place In Heaven for me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Someday when fades the golden sun Beneath horizons in the west My blessed Lord will say "well done" Then I shall enter into rest
